name: openclaw
description: Personal AI assistant with a web Control UI — sign in with your ChatGPT/Claude subscription in the browser, chat, and connect a Telegram bot, all without a terminal. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions stays enabled for overlay consumers (paperclip, etc.).

env.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
env.prompt: Optional: Telegram bot token from @BotFather (leave blank to connect later in the Control UI)
